buttons.primary: h-10 px-6 rounded-full font-medium shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20 transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: h-10 px-6 rounded-full border border-emerald-200 bg-white text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-emerald-100 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.stat_card: relative overflow-hidden p-6 flex flex-col justify-between h-full

inputs.base: h-10 rounded-lg border-emerald-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm

tables.wrapper: rounded-xl border border-emerald-100 overflow-hidden bg-white shadow-sm

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle noise textures over gradients to avoid 'plastic' look

login.layout: Split screen. Left: 60% width with 'login_background' and heavy emerald overlay. Right: 40% clean white form.
login.elements: Glassmorphic login card if using full background. Otherwise, clean minimal form on white.
login.branding: Large typography quote on the image side: 'Mengantar Anda dengan Aman & Nyaman'.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (fixed left). Main content area with 'bento_grid'.
dashboard.charts: Use Recharts. Line chart for Revenue (Pendapatan), Bar chart for Passenger counts. Color: Emerald tones.
dashboard.stats: Display: Total Revenue, Total Departures, Active Drivers, Total Cars.

data_keberangkatan.features: CRUD Table. Auto-calculation fields. Date picker (Shadcn Calendar).
data_keberangkatan.calculation_logic: Uang PC = (Jumlah Uang Penumpang + Jumlah Uang Paket) * 0.85. Uang Bersih = Total - Uang PC.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
Ensure high contrast for text on green backgrounds.
Implement 'Lenis' for smooth scrolling if possible, or at least smooth CSS scrolling.
